Digital Archive // v2.0

RESEARCH // ARTIFACTS

The Archive.

A collection of personal artifacts, tools, and research. Each project represents a moment of curiosity—some solved problems, others just asked better questions.

Code

AuraSync

A background system that automates a music library and syncs listening activity with Discord presence. The idea was to create something that runs silently in the shadows, bridging the gap between my local archive and my digital identity.

TypeScript Python Spotify
Examine Artifact →
Code

OmniShell

A Rust-based encrypted messaging CLI supporting multiple communication protocols and privacy-focused networking. It’s an exploration into how we can communicate when the standard infrastructure isn’t enough, focusing on resilience and absolute privacy.

Rust Cryptography P2P
Examine Artifact →
Code

NBTHotbar

A collection of Minecraft NBT exploit files for testing server behavior. Documented, educational, comes with warnings.

Minecraft NBT Java Edition
Examine Artifact →
AI

QuickCmd

An AI-powered CLI assistant that converts natural language into safe shell commands. I built this to bridge the gap between human intent and the precision of the terminal, ensuring every suggested command is visible and vetted before it touches the system.

Go AI CLI
Examine Artifact →
AI

CodeArchaeologist-AI

A platform for analyzing complex codebases using AI, visualizing architecture, and improving legacy systems. It’s about digging through layers of logic to find the original intent, making old systems understandable again through a modern lens.

Python AI Architecture
Examine Artifact →
Code

ATLAS

A real-time visualization system that reveals how large codebases are structured. Watching a codebase and its connections emerge as a living graph helps me understand the "gravity" of a project's architecture rather than just reading lines of code.

JavaScript Visualization Graph
Examine Artifact →
UI/UX

Figma Learning Journal

Three early design sessions — learning Figma from scratch. A hero section, a product card, and a dark landing page.

Figma UI Design Learning
Examine Artifact →
